row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight curvature to the left.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Construction barriers and workers on the right side are static relative to the ground; vehicles ahead maintain forward trajectory.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime urban street scene showing a multi-lane road under construction. The view is captured from a moving vehicle.
traffic_elements: Double yellow lines on the right edge
semantic.visibility_notes: Clear visibility of all objects. No significant occlusions or blurring affecting object identification.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward camera movement consistent with vehicle travel. Objects transition naturally without sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Workers and machinery remain visible and stationary relative to the road frame. The white car ahead maintains consistent position and speed.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and barrier alignment remain stable and continuous throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily within its lane, maintaining safe distance from the construction zone on the right.
decision.risk_context: No immediate risk detected. The presence of construction activity requires attention but does not necessitate emergency maneuvers.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated approximation of the same urban street scene with construction. Visual fidelity is lower than the reference.
key_objects: Barriers appear distorted and less defined
Construction workers are blurry or partially missing
Machinery shapes are inconsistent or merged with barriers
White sedan is present but lacks detail
Buildings have simplified textures and structural inaccuracies
Trees show unnatural blending or repetition
traffic_elements: Lane markings are faint or broken
Curbs and edges are poorly defined
Some elements like signs or poles may be missing or malformed
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant degradation in clarity. Many objects lack sharp boundaries or realistic texture. Some elements appear hallucinated or duplicated.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Camera motion appears smooth but exhibits subtle warping or flickering in background structures. Object transitions are less stable compared to Row 1.
logical.object_continuity: Some objects (e.g., workers) intermittently vanish or reappear with altered form. Barriers show minor positional drift across frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Building lines and road edges exhibit slight bending or misalignment over time, indicating generative instability.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion mimics forward progression, though path stability is slightly compromised by visual artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability due to artifacting may impair accurate perception of hazards. No explicit risky behavior is modeled, but environmental understanding is degraded.

preserved_elements: General road layout and direction of travel
Presence of construction zone on the right
Approximate location of vehicles and buildings
missing_or_weakened_elements: Sharpness of lane markings and curb lines
Textural realism of building facades and foliage
newly_introduced_elements: Hallucinated barrier segments or merged objects
Flickering or ghosting effects around static structures
artifacts_or_instabilities: Blurring and loss of fine detail in generated video
Minor geometric distortions in building and road structures
Slight temporal jitter in background elements
